requirement_topic.en: ODS / HFC Refrigerant Controls — SAyDS / DNCP (Montreal Protocol HCFC Phasedown and HFC Import Permitting)
requirement_topic.zh: 消耗臭氧层物质/氢氟碳化物制冷剂管制——SAyDS / DNCP（蒙特利尔议定书HCFC淘汰计划及HFC进口许可）
requirement_topic.zht: 消耗臭氧層物質/氫氟碳化物製冷劑管制——SAyDS / DNCP（蒙特利爾議定書HCFC淘汰計畫及HFC進口許可）

summary.en: Argentina regulates ozone-depleting substances (ODS) and HFC refrigerants through the Secretaría de Ambiente y Desarrollo Sustentable (SAyDS) and its Dirección Nacional de Control de la Contaminación y Prevención (DNCP), consistent with Argentina's obligations under the Montreal Protocol and its Kigali Amendment. Argentina is on an HCFC phasedown schedule; R-22 use in new equipment is being progressively eliminated. HFC refrigerants such as R-410A and R-32 are currently permitted in new air-conditioning and heat-pump equipment, but require import permits and may be subject to quota. Importers of equipment containing HFCs must obtain the relevant SAyDS permit before importation. Documentation of refrigerant type, GWP, and charge weight must accompany the product declaration.
summary.zh: 阿根廷通过环境与可持续发展秘书处（SAyDS）及其污染控制与预防国家局（DNCP）依据《蒙特利尔议定书》及基加利修正案下的义务对消耗臭氧层物质（ODS）和HFC制冷剂进行管制。阿根廷执行HCFC淘汰计划，R-22在新设备中的使用正逐步取消。R-410A和R-32等HFC制冷剂目前在新型空调和热泵设备中被允许使用，但须取得进口许可且可能受配额限制。含HFC设备的进口商须在进口前获得相关SAyDS许可。产品申报须附制冷剂类型、全球变暖潜能值（GWP）及充注重量的文件。
summary.zht: 阿根廷通過環境與永續發展秘書處（SAyDS）及其污染控制與預防國家局（DNCP）依據《蒙特利爾議定書》及基加利修正案下的義務對消耗臭氧層物質（ODS）和HFC製冷劑進行管制。阿根廷執行HCFC淘汰計畫，R-22在新設備中的使用正逐步取消。R-410A和R-32等HFC製冷劑目前在新型空調和熱泵設備中被允許使用，但須取得進口許可且可能受配額限制。含HFC設備的進口商須在進口前獲得相關SAyDS許可。產品申報須附製冷劑類型、全球暖化潛能值（GWP）及充注重量的文件。

standards_or_laws: Ley 24.040 (ODS control law, Argentina) and subsequent regulations
Montreal Protocol on Substances that Deplete the Ozone Layer (Argentina is a Party)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol (HFC phasedown obligations)
SAyDS / DNCP import permit requirements for ODS and HFC-containing equipment

summary.en: China regulates ODS and HFCs under the Regulations on the Administration of Ozone Depleting Substances (2010) and related MOFCOM/MEE measures, consistent with China's Montreal Protocol obligations and Kigali Amendment commitments. China's HCFC phasedown targets R-22 elimination in new room air conditioners. GB 9237 provides the baseline refrigerant safety standard. Chinese exporters typically document refrigerant type (R-410A, R-32 increasingly common) and charge weight on the product datasheet and CCC declaration. Chinese ODS documentation does not substitute for Argentine SAyDS import permits.
summary.zh: 中国依据《消耗臭氧层物质管理条例》（2010年）及商务部/生态环境部相关措施，依照《蒙特利尔议定书》及基加利修正案承诺对ODS和HFC进行管制。中国HCFC淘汰目标包括在新型房间空调器中取消R-22使用。GB 9237提供制冷剂安全基准标准。中国出口商通常在产品数据表和CCC申报中注明制冷剂类型（R-410A、R-32日益普遍）和充注重量。中国ODS文件不能替代阿根廷SAyDS进口许可。
summary.zht: 中國依據《消耗臭氧層物質管理條例》（2010年）及商務部/生態環境部相關措施，依照《蒙特利爾議定書》及基加利修正案承諾對ODS和HFC進行管制。中國HCFC淘汰目標包括在新型房間空調器中取消R-22使用。GB 9237提供製冷劑安全基準標準。中國出口商通常在產品數據表和CCC申報中標注製冷劑類型（R-410A、R-32日益普遍）及充注重量。中國ODS文件不能替代阿根廷SAyDS進口許可。

standards_or_laws: Regulations on the Administration of Ozone Depleting Substances (China, 2010)
GB 9237 (refrigerating systems and heat pumps — safety and environmental requirements, China)
GB 25454 (minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for multi-connected air conditioning and heat pump units, China)

gap.en: Argentine SAyDS import permits for HFC-containing equipment are a separate legal obligation from Chinese ODS documentation. Chinese exporters must provide refrigerant type (e.g. R-410A, R-32), GWP value, and charge weight on product documentation so that the Argentine importer can fulfil SAyDS permit obligations. Equipment charged with R-22 should be avoided as Argentina is phasing out HCFC use in new equipment. R-32 and R-410A are currently acceptable but importers should verify current quota status with SAyDS before shipment.
gap.zh: 含HFC设备的阿根廷SAyDS进口许可是独立于中国ODS文件之外的法律义务。中国出口商须在产品文件中提供制冷剂类型（如R-410A、R-32）、GWP值和充注重量，以便阿根廷进口商履行SAyDS许可义务。应避免使用R-22充注的设备，因阿根廷正在淘汰新设备中的HCFC使用。R-32和R-410A目前可接受，但进口商在出货前应向SAyDS核实当前配额状态。
gap.zht: 含HFC設備的阿根廷SAyDS進口許可是獨立於中國ODS文件之外的法律義務。中國出口商須在產品文件中提供製冷劑類型（如R-410A、R-32）、GWP值和充注重量，以便阿根廷進口商履行SAyDS許可義務。應避免使用R-22充注的設備，因阿根廷正在淘汰新設備中的HCFC使用。R-32和R-410A目前可接受，但進口商在出貨前應向SAyDS核實當前配額狀態。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory SAyDS import permit required for HFC-containing equipment; HCFC (R-22) restricted in new equipment under Argentine phasedown schedule
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory ODS reporting and HCFC phasedown compliance under Chinese regulations; separate from Argentine SAyDS obligations

source.publisher: Secretaría de Ambiente y Desarrollo Sustentable (SAyDS), Argentina

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Significant gap — Argentine SAyDS import permits for HFC-containing equipment are a separate requirement from Chinese ODS documentation. Avoid R-22-charged units; confirm R-410A or R-32 quota availability with SAyDS before shipment and ensure refrigerant type, GWP, and charge weight are documented on all export paperwork.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在重大差距——含HFC设备的阿根廷SAyDS进口许可是独立于中国ODS文件的单独要求。应避免R-22充注设备；出货前应向SAyDS确认R-410A或R-32配额可用性，并确保所有出口文件中记录制冷剂类型、GWP及充注重量。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在重大差距——含HFC設備的阿根廷SAyDS進口許可是獨立於中國ODS文件的單獨要求。應避免R-22充注設備；出貨前應向SAyDS確認R-410A或R-32配額可用性，並確保所有出口文件中記錄製冷劑類型、GWP及充注重量。
